evals.prompt: Is Uneed worth submitting to for SEO backlinks? How does it compare?
evals.expected_output: Explains Uneed offers a free dofollow backlink at DR74, which is one of the highest from any startup directory. Compares with Open Launch (DR65), DevHunt (DR57-62), TinyLaunch (DR60-71). Notes only Product Hunt (DR91) and Hacker News (DR91) significantly exceed it.

assertions.name: dr_value
assertions.description: States Uneed has a DR74 dofollow backlink, one of the highest free directory backlinks

assertions.name: comparison
assertions.description: Compares with at least one other directory like Open Launch (DR65) or DevHunt (DR57-62)

assertions.name: free_backlink
assertions.description: Notes the DR74 dofollow backlink is available on the free tier without needing to win or place Top 3, unlike some other directories

evals.prompt: Should I pay $29.99 to skip the line on Uneed or just wait for free?
evals.expected_output: Explains Skip the Line lets you choose your launch date for $29.99 vs waiting in the free queue. Recommends paying if coordinating a multi-platform launch or need timing control. Notes the free backlink is the same either way — DR74 dofollow.

assertions.name: skip_cost
assertions.description: States Skip the Line costs $29.99 and lets you choose your launch date

assertions.name: free_alternative
assertions.description: Mentions the free option (Join the Line or free queue) and notes the wait time is unclear or variable

assertions.name: same_backlink
assertions.description: Clarifies the backlink value is the same whether free or paid — DR74 dofollow

evals.prompt: How do I submit my product to Uneed and what should I prepare?
evals.expected_output: Walks through submission: create account, prepare materials (name, description, screenshots, working URL), submit via /submit-a-tool, choose free or Skip the Line ($29.99), compete in 24-hour daily voting window, engage with community.

assertions.name: submission_steps
assertions.description: Describes creating an account and submitting with product details and screenshots

assertions.name: launch_options
assertions.description: Mentions Join the Line (free) and Skip the Line ($29.99) options

assertions.name: daily_competition
assertions.description: Notes the daily 24-hour voting competition format with 8-15 products per day
